_meta._notes: Curated subset of the most-asked KiCad-10 menu/shortcut actions. Source: KiCad 10.0 install (default keymap, no user override). Update when KiCad rebinds keys upstream.

actions.description_en: Create a new KiCad project (kicad_pro + kicad_sch + kicad_pcb).
Discard in-memory changes and reload from disk.
actions.description_de: Speicher-Änderungen verwerfen und von Disk neu laden.

actions.description_en: Zoom to fit the entire drawing.
Configure grid step values and display style.
Add a schematic symbol from the library.
Sync footprints + nets from schematic to PCB (F8).
actions.description_de: Footprints + Nets vom Schaltplan ins PCB übertragen (F8).

actions.description_en: Compute fill for all copper zones (B).
Remove computed fill from all zones.
Route a single track from pad (X).
Flip selected footprint to opposite layer (F).
actions.description_de: Ausgewähltes Footprint auf andere Seite spiegeln (F).

actions.description_en: Bundle the project into a single .zip archive.
Import DXF/SVG/PNG graphics into the current document.
Fit the current selection to view.
Switch to the next grid in the list.
actions.description_de: Zum nächsten Raster der Liste wechseln.

actions.description_en: Switch to the previous grid in the list.
actions.description_de: Zum vorigen Raster der Liste wechseln.

actions.description_en: Cycle between the fast grids (Alt+1, Alt+2).
Export the netlist (KiCad sexpr / Cadstar / OrcadPCB2 / Spice / Allegro).
actions.description_de: Netzliste exportieren (KiCad sexpr / Cadstar / OrcadPCB2 / Spice / Allegro).

actions.description_en: Plot schematic to PDF / SVG / DXF / Postscript / HPGL.
actions.description_de: Schaltplan als PDF / SVG / DXF / Postscript / HPGL plotten.

actions.description_en: Export all symbols of the sheet into a library file.
actions.description_de: Alle Symbole des Schaltplans in eine Bibliothek exportieren.

actions.description_en: Place a no-connect cross on an unused pin.
Place an image on the schematic.
Open the hierarchical sheet navigator panel.
Go up one level in the sheet hierarchy.
actions.description_de: Eine Ebene in der Blatt-Hierarchie nach oben.

actions.description_en: Move one level up in the hierarchy.
actions.description_de: Eine Ebene in der Hierarchie nach oben gehen.

actions.description_en: Open properties dialog of the selected item.
Edit the Value field of the selected symbol.
Edit the Reference field (e.g. R5 → R10).
Assign / change the footprint of the symbol.
Swap position of two selected items.

menu_path_en: Edit Library Symbol with Symbol Editor
actions.description_en: Open the library symbol of the selected instance in Symbol Editor.
actions.description_de: Bibliotheks-Symbol des ausgewählten Symbols im Symbol-Editor öffnen.

actions.description_en: Open the spreadsheet-style symbol fields editor.
Sync schematic with changes made in the PCB editor.
actions.description_de: Schaltplan mit Änderungen aus dem PCB-Editor synchronisieren.

actions.description_en: Open the schematic setup dialog (formatting, field templates, ERC).
Place a footprint from a library.
Place a text on the PCB.
Cut a hole into an existing zone.
Tune length of a single track.
Tune length of a differential pair.
Tune skew of a differential pair.
Switch to the next-larger track width.
Switch to the next-smaller track width.
Switch to the next-larger via size.
Open the master board setup dialog (Stackup, Net Classes, Constraints).
Configure DRC constraints (min track, min hole, copper-to-edge).
actions.description_de: DRC-Designvorgaben konfigurieren (min. Leiterbahn, min. Bohrung, Cu-zu-Rand).

actions.description_en: Configure the PCB layer stackup (dielectric thicknesses, copper weights).
Configure solder-mask and paste-mask expansion defaults.
Configure default text size, line thickness, dimension format.
Back-sync changes from PCB to schematic.
actions.description_de: Änderungen vom PCB zurück in den Schaltplan synchronisieren.

actions.description_en: Remove redundant/overlapping tracks and unconnected vias.
actions.description_de: Redundante/überlappende Leiterbahnen und nicht-verbundene Vias entfernen.

actions.description_en: Export component position file for pick-and-place.
Submenu with all fabrication output exports.
Swap items between two copper layers.
Show the net inspector (length, vias, layers per net).
actions.description_de: Netz-Inspektor zeigen (Länge, Vias, Layer pro Netz).

actions.description_en: Highlight the selected net in colour.
Switch active layer (places via if routing).
actions.description_de: Aktive Layer wechseln (setzt Via beim Routen).

actions.description_en: Increase opacity of the active layer.
Decrease opacity of the active layer.
Embed 3D models into the PCB file (portability).
Open the PCB calculator (trace width, electric, R-divider).
Manage installed plugins and content packs.
Flip the PCB top/bottom in the 3D view.
